vibe: modern, premium, technological, elegant, minimalist, fast, clean - Linear/Stripe inspired

scale.h1: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-slate-900 dark:text-white
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-slate-900 dark:text-white

cards.style: bg-white dark:bg-[#131822] border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-xl shadow-sm

buttons.primary: bg-[#1A5F61] dark:bg-[#4FD1C5] text-white dark:text-slate-900 hover:bg-[#134E4A] dark:hover:bg-[#38B2AC] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white dark:bg-[#131822] text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-200 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-900 dark:hover:text-white hover:bg-slate-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors

sidebar.style: fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen w-64 border-r border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 bg-white/50 dark:bg-[#0B0F15]/50 backdrop-blur-xl z-40
sidebar.link_active: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-md bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 text-slate-900 dark:text-white font-medium transition-colors
sidebar.link_inactive: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-900 dark:hover:text-white hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors

header.style: sticky top-0 h-16 border-b border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 bg-white/70 dark:bg-[#0B0F15]/70 backdrop-blur-xl z-30 flex items-center justify-between px-6

tables.container: w-full overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800
tables.header_cell: bg-slate-50 dark:bg-[#131822] px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider border-b border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800
tables.row: bg-white dark:bg-[#131822] hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors border-b border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800/50 last:border-0
tables.cell: px-4 py-3 whitespace-nowrap text-sm text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-300

badges.success: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800 dark:bg-emerald-500/10 dark:text-emerald-400
badges.warning: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 dark:bg-amber-500/10 dark:text-amber-400
badges.neutral: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium bg-slate-100 text-slate-800 dark:bg-slate-800 dark:text-slate-400

hero_login.description: Modern minimal waiting area for login background

clinic_interior.description: Premium clinical interior for dashboard visual accents

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Geist font via next/font or Google Fonts. If unavailable, use Satoshi or Inter.
Do NOT use thick borders or heavy box shadows. Rely on 1px borders (border-slate-200 or dark:border-slate-800) and soft #F7F8FA backgrounds to create layout hierarchy.
Implement Lucide React for all iconography. Keep icon size consistent (size={18} or size={20}) and stroke-width={1.5} for a premium, lightweight feel.
Ensure the sidebar uses a subtle glassmorphism effect if content scrolls behind it, or stick to a solid crisp background.
Dashboards must use the Bento grid strategy for widgets. Mix different heights/spans (col-span-1, col-span-2) to avoid visual monotony.
Tables should be built using Shadcn UI table primitive, but strip out any heavy borders. Use border-collapse and subtle row hover effects.
Data components (KPI cards, charts) must avoid full-screen gradients. Use solid colors with high contrast text and a subtle controlled teal accent.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements for robust testing.
